cards.back: A linear approach to software development where each phase is completed before moving on to the next one
An iterative and incremental approach to software development that emphasizes flexibility and collaboration
A hybrid approach that combines elements of the waterfall and agile models, focusing on risk management and flexibility
Requirements gathering, analysis, design, implementation, testing, and maintenance
A methodology where software is developed in small increments, with each increment being a working product that can be reviewed and refined before proceeding to the next increment
